501.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "There is not a single thing except that there is an angel over it in prostration. If you knew what I know, you would laugh little and weep much, you would not enjoy the company of women in your beds, and you would go out into the open, crying out to Allah." Abu Dharr said: "By Allah, I wish I were a tree that is cut down."
501.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Tidak ada satu pun sesuatu kecuali ada malaikat yang bersujud atasnya. Jika kalian mengetahui apa yang aku ketahui, kalian akan sedikit tertawa dan banyak menangis, kalian tidak akan menikmati kebersamaan dengan wanita di tempat tidur kalian, dan kalian akan keluar ke lapangan terbuka sambil berseru kepada Allah." Abu Dharr berkata: "Demi Allah, aku berharap menjadi pohon yang ditebang."

502.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله commanded him with five things, one of which was to speak the truth even if it is bitter, and to say 'La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah.' A freed servant of the Ghifar tribe said: "I do not know what remains of the five except our saying: 'La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah.'"
502.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله memerintahkannya dengan lima hal, salah satunya berkata benar meskipun pahit, dan mengucapkan 'La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah.' Seorang hamba yang dimerdekakan dari suku Ghifar berkata: "Aku tidak tahu apa yang tersisa dari lima hal itu kecuali ucapan kami: 'La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah.'"

503.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "My beloved دلوالله commanded me with three things that I will never abandon, if Allah wills: he commanded me to pray Duha, to pray Witr before sleeping, and to fast three days of every month."
503.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berkata: "Kekasihku دلوالله memerintahkanku dengan tiga hal yang tidak akan pernah aku tinggalkan, jika Allah menghendaki: beliau memerintahkanku untuk shalat Dhuha, shalat Witir sebelum tidur, dan berpuasa tiga hari setiap bulan."

504.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "Do not belittle any act of kindness — even if you cannot find anything, meet your brother with a cheerful face."
504.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Janganlah meremehkan kebaikan apa pun — bahkan jika kamu tidak dapat menemukan apa pun, temuilah saudaramu dengan wajah yang ceria."

505.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he instructed people to evacuate a place because the believers would need it on the Day of Resurrection. He said he saw two men disputing over a single brick's space and he himself left the place.
505.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia memerintahkan orang-orang untuk mengosongkan suatu tempat karena orang-orang beriman akan membutuhkannya pada Hari Kiamat. Ia berkata bahwa ia melihat dua orang berselisih tentang ruang selebar satu batu bata dan ia sendiri meninggalkan tempat itu.

506.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "Allah accepts the repentance of His servant and forgives His servant as long as the veil does not descend." They asked: "O Messenger of Allah, what is the veil?" He said: "The soul dying while it is in a state of associating partners with Allah."
506.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Allah menerima taubat hamba-Nya dan mengampuni hamba-Nya selama tabir tidak turun." Mereka bertanya: "Wahai Rasulullah, apa tabir itu?" Beliau bersabda: "Jiwa yang meninggal dalam keadaan menyekutukan Allah."

507.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "Allah accepts the repentance of His servant as long as the veil has not descended. The veil descends when the soul dies while associating partners with Allah."
507.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Allah menerima taubat hamba-Nya selama tabir belum turun. Tabir turun ketika jiwa meninggal dalam keadaan menyekutukan Allah."

508.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he performed tawaf around the Kaaba and prayed. Then he approached the Prophet دلوالله and was the first to greet him with the greeting of Islam. He said: "And upon you and the mercy of Allah. From which tribe are you?" He said: "From Ghifar." The Prophet دلوالله placed his hand on his forehead, and Abu Dharr thought he was displeased — but it was a gesture of mercy.
508.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia melakukan tawaf mengelilingi Kabah dan shalat. Kemudian ia mendekati Nabi دلوالله dan menjadi yang pertama menyapanya dengan salam Islam. Beliau bersabda: "Dan atasmu dan rahmat Allah. Dari suku mana kamu?" Ia berkata: "Dari Ghifar." Nabi دلوالله meletakkan tangannya di dahinya, dan Abu Dharr mengira beliau tidak senang — tetapi itu adalah isyarat kasih sayang.

509.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that Masruq said he wished to ask the Prophet دلوالله something. Abu Dharr said: "I already asked him — he said: 'Light — how could I see Him?'"
509.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Masruq berkata ingin bertanya kepada Nabi دلوالله tentang sesuatu. Abu Dharr berkata: "Aku sudah menanyakannya — beliau bersabda: 'Cahaya — bagaimana mungkin aku bisa melihat-Nya?'"

510.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that his wife had some money remaining — perhaps seven dinars — and he ordered her to buy small coins with it. When asked why not save it for a need or a guest, he said: "My close friend instructed me that any gold or silver that is sealed away becomes like hot coals on its owner's body on the Day of Resurrection, until he exhausts it in the way of Allah."
510.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa istrinya memiliki sisa uang — mungkin tujuh dinar — dan ia memerintahkannya untuk membeli koin kecil dengannya. Ketika ditanya mengapa tidak menyimpannya untuk kebutuhan atau tamu, ia berkata: "Kekasihku berpesan kepadaku bahwa emas atau perak apa pun yang disimpan menjadi seperti bara api di tubuh pemiliknya pada Hari Kiamat, hingga ia menghabiskannya di jalan Allah."

511.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "I asked the Messenger of Allah دلوالله: 'Which speech is most beloved to Allah the Exalted?' He said: 'What Allah has chosen for His angels: SubhanAllah wa bihamdihi' — and say it three times."
511.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku bertanya kepada Rasulullah دلوالله: 'Ucapan apa yang paling dicintai Allah Yang Maha Tinggi?' Beliau bersabda: 'Apa yang Allah pilih untuk malaikat-malaikat-Nya: SubhanAllah wa bihamdihi' — dan ucapkanlah tiga kali."

512.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said regarding three whom Allah loves: "A man who travels with a group and they walk until sleep overcomes them, then the last of the night arrives and he rises to perform his ablution and prayer." As for the three whom Allah hates: "The arrogant and the boastful — and you will find in the Book of Allah 'Verily, Allah does not love anyone who is arrogant and boastful.'"
512.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda tentang tiga yang dicintai Allah: "Seorang laki-laki yang bepergian bersama rombongan dan mereka berjalan hingga kantuk menguasai mereka, kemudian ujung malam tiba dan ia bangun untuk berwudhu dan shalat." Adapun tiga yang dibenci Allah: "Yang sombong dan yang congkak — dan kamu akan menemukan dalam Kitab Allah 'Sesungguhnya Allah tidak menyukai orang yang sombong dan membanggakan diri.'"

513.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "There will be some people from my nation whose mark is shaving their heads. They recite the Quran but it does not pass beyond their throats. They pass through the religion as an arrow passes through game. They are the worst of created beings."
513.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Akan ada beberapa orang dari umatku yang tandanya adalah mencukur kepala mereka. Mereka membaca Al-Quran tetapi tidak melewati tenggorokan mereka. Mereka keluar dari agama sebagaimana anak panah keluar dari sasaran buruan. Mereka adalah seburuk-buruk makhluk."

514.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "I would not like to have gold equal to Mount Uhud and to die leaving a dinar or half a dinar of it, except for a creditor."
514.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Aku tidak ingin memiliki emas sebesar Gunung Uhud dan meninggal dengan menyisakan satu dinar atau setengah dinar darinya, kecuali untuk membayar hutang."

515.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله told the one about to call the adhan: "Wait, wait" — or: "Cool down, cool down." He said: "Indeed the intensity of heat is from the breath of Hell, so when the heat is extreme, cool down before praying." Abu Dharr said: "Until we saw the shade of the hillocks."
515.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله memberitahu orang yang akan mengumandangkan adzan: "Tunggu, tunggu" — atau: "Biarkan sejuk, biarkan sejuk." Beliau bersabda: "Sesungguhnya teriknya panas berasal dari embusan neraka Jahannam, maka ketika panas sangat terik, tunggulah hingga dingin sebelum shalat." Abu Dharr berkata: "Hingga kami melihat bayangan bukit-bukit kecil."

516.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that people were fleeing from him. He was asked why, and he said: "I forbid them from hoarding wealth, just as the Messenger of Allah دلوالله used to forbid them from it."
516.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa orang-orang melarikan dirinya. Ia ditanya mengapa, dan ia berkata: "Aku melarang mereka dari menimbun harta, sebagaimana Rasulullah دلوالله biasa melarang mereka darinya."

517.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "May Allah grant safety to Aslam — may Allah keep them safe. And Ghifar — may Allah, the Blessed and Exalted, forgive them."
517.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Semoga Allah menyelamatkan Aslam — semoga Allah menjaga mereka. Dan Ghifar — semoga Allah Yang Maha Diberkahi dan Maha Tinggi mengampuni mereka."

518.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "Fear Allah wherever you are, and follow a bad deed with a good deed to erase it, and treat people with good character."
518.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Bertakwalah kepada Allah di mana pun kamu berada, dan ikutilah perbuatan buruk dengan perbuatan baik yang akan menghapusnya, dan bergaullah dengan manusia dengan akhlak yang baik."

519.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله commanded them to fast the thirteenth, fourteenth, and fifteenth days of each month.
519.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله memerintahkan mereka untuk berpuasa pada hari ketiga belas, keempat belas, dan kelima belas setiap bulan.

520.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله stood one night in prayer reciting a single verse and repeating it.
520.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله berdiri satu malam dalam shalat membaca satu ayat dan mengulang-ulangnya.

521.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "Whoever performs ghusl and purifies himself well, wears his best clothes, applies what Allah has prescribed for him of perfume or oil, then comes to Jumu'ah and does not engage in idle talk, and does not separate between two people — Allah will forgive him what is between that Friday and the previous Friday."
521.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Barang siapa mandi dan bersuci dengan baik, memakai pakaian terbaiknya, mengoleskan parfum atau minyak yang Allah tetapkan baginya, kemudian datang ke shalat Jumat dan tidak berbicara sia-sia, serta tidak memisahkan antara dua orang — Allah akan mengampuninya atas apa yang ada antara Jumat itu dan Jumat sebelumnya."

522.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "Allah the Blessed and Exalted says: 'O My servants, all of you are sinners except those whom I have protected — so seek My forgiveness and I will forgive you. Whoever knows that I have power to forgive and seeks My forgiveness with trust in My power, I will forgive him — and I do not care.'"
522.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Allah Yang Maha Diberkahi dan Maha Tinggi berfirman: 'Wahai hamba-hamba-Ku, kalian semua adalah pendosa kecuali yang Aku lindungi — maka mohonlah ampun kepada-Ku dan Aku akan mengampunimu. Barang siapa mengetahui bahwa Aku memiliki kemampuan untuk mengampuni dan memohon ampun kepada-Ku dengan kepercayaan pada kemampuan-Ku, Aku akan mengampuninya — dan Aku tidak peduli.'"

523.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله asked him about where the sun goes. He said: "Allah and His Messenger know best." He said: "It goes until it prostrates before its Lord the Exalted, then seeks permission and is granted it. And as if it were told: 'Return to where you came from.' So it will rise from the west. That is its fixed course." Then he recited: "And the sun runs on its fixed course" [Quran 36:38]."
523.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bertanya kepadanya ke mana matahari pergi. Ia berkata: "Allah dan Rasul-Nya lebih mengetahui." Beliau bersabda: "Ia pergi hingga bersujud kepada Tuhannya Yang Maha Tinggi, kemudian meminta izin dan diberi izin. Dan seakan-akan dikatakan kepadanya: 'Kembalilah ke tempat asalmu.' Maka ia akan terbit dari barat. Itulah jalannya yang tetap." Kemudian beliau membaca: "Dan matahari berjalan pada jalannya yang tetap" [QS. 36:38]."

524.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man met him and asked him to pray for him. Abu Dharr said: "I heard Umar saying: 'What a fine young man.' And I heard the Messenger of Allah دلوالله say: 'Allah has placed the truth upon the tongue of Umar and his heart.'"
524.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa seorang laki-laki menemuinya dan memintanya berdoa untuknya. Abu Dharr berkata: "Aku mendengar Umar berkata: 'Sungguh pemuda yang baik.' Dan aku mendengar Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: 'Allah telah menempatkan kebenaran pada lisan Umar dan hatinya.'"

525.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked the Prophet دلوالله about the saying of Allah the Exalted: "The sun runs on its fixed course" [Quran 36:38]. He said: "Its fixed course is beneath the Throne."
525.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Nabi دلوالله tentang firman Allah Yang Maha Tinggi: "Matahari berjalan pada jalannya yang tetap" [QS. 36:38]. Beliau bersabda: "Jalannya yang tetap adalah di bawah Arsy."

526.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "There are three to whom Allah will not speak, will not look at, and will not purify on the Day of Resurrection, and for them is a painful punishment: the one who drags his garment, the one who gives then reminds of his gift, and the one who sells his goods with a false oath."
526.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Ada tiga yang Allah tidak akan berbicara kepada mereka, tidak akan melihat mereka, dan tidak akan menyucikan mereka pada Hari Kiamat, dan bagi mereka ada siksa yang pedih: orang yang menyeret pakaiannya, orang yang memberi kemudian mengungkit pemberiannya, dan orang yang menjual barangnya dengan sumpah palsu."

527.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله stoned a woman who had committed adultery and commanded Abu Dharr to dig a hole for her, which he dug to her navel.
527.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله merajam seorang wanita yang telah berzina dan memerintahkan Abu Dharr untuk menggali lubang untuknya, yang ia gali hingga setinggi pusarnya.

528.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked the Prophet دلوالله about which charity is best. He said: "The effort of one with little means, or a secret given to a poor person." He asked: "Which of the prophets was first?" He said: "Adam." He asked: "Was he a prophet?" He said: "Yes, a speaking prophet." He asked: "How many were the messengers?" He said: "Three hundred and some tens — a large group."
528.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Nabi دلوالله tentang sedekah mana yang terbaik. Beliau bersabda: "Usaha seseorang yang serba kekurangan, atau sesuatu yang diberikan secara diam-diam kepada orang miskin." Ia bertanya: "Nabi mana yang pertama?" Beliau bersabda: "Adam." Ia bertanya: "Apakah ia seorang nabi?" Beliau bersabda: "Ya, nabi yang berbicara langsung." Ia bertanya: "Berapa jumlah para rasul?" Beliau bersabda: "Tiga ratus sekian puluh — sekelompok besar."

529.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man came to the Prophet دلوالله complaining about hardships. The Prophet دلوالله said: "I fear for you something more than that — that the world will be poured upon you as it was poured on those before you. I wish my nation would not wear gold."
529.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa seorang laki-laki datang kepada Nabi دلوالله mengeluhkan kesulitan. Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Aku lebih takut terhadap sesuatu yang lebih dari itu untukmu — bahwa dunia akan dicurahkan kepadamu sebagaimana dicurahkan kepada mereka sebelum kamu. Aku berharap umatku tidak memakai emas."

530.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله asked whether a man fulfilling his desire with his wife counts as charity. He said: "Yes — do you not see that if he placed that desire in what Allah has forbidden, would there not be sin for him?" They said: "Yes." He said: "Likewise, when he places it in what Allah has made lawful, it is charity."
530.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله ditanya apakah seorang laki-laki yang memenuhi hasratnya dengan istrinya dihitung sebagai sedekah. Beliau bersabda: "Ya — tidakkah kamu lihat bahwa jika ia menempatkan hasrat itu pada yang Allah haramkan, apakah tidak ada dosa baginya?" Mereka berkata: "Ya." Beliau bersabda: "Demikian pula, ketika ia menempatkannya pada yang Allah halalkan, itu adalah sedekah."

531.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "The deeds of my nation were presented to me — their good and their bad. I found among the best of their deeds removing harm from the road. And I found among the worst of their deeds spittle in the mosque that is not buried."
531.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Amal-amal umatku diperlihatkan kepadaku — yang baik dan yang buruk. Aku menemukan di antara amal terbaik mereka menyingkirkan gangguan dari jalan. Dan aku menemukan di antara amal terburuk mereka dahak di masjid yang tidak dikubur."

532.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "The deeds of my nation were presented to me — their good and their bad. I found among the best of their deeds removing harm from the road. And I found among the worst of their deeds spittle in the mosque that is not buried."
532.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Amal-amal umatku diperlihatkan kepadaku — yang baik dan yang buruk. Aku menemukan di antara amal terbaik mereka menyingkirkan gangguan dari jalan. Dan aku menemukan di antara amal terburuk mereka dahak di masjid yang tidak dikubur."

533.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he wished he could be a dove in Makkah. The Prophet دلوالله asked: "What will you do if you are expelled from Makkah?" He said: "To the spaciousness of Syria and the Holy Land." He asked: "And if expelled from Syria?" He said: "By the One Who sent you with the truth, I would put my sword on my shoulder." The Prophet دلوالله said: "Or something better — hear, obey, and be patient."
533.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berharap menjadi merpati di Makkah. Nabi دلوالله bertanya: "Apa yang akan kamu lakukan jika kamu diusir dari Makkah?" Ia berkata: "Ke keluasan Syam dan Tanah Suci." Beliau bertanya: "Dan jika diusir dari Syam?" Ia berkata: "Demi Dzat yang mengutusmu dengan kebenaran, aku akan meletakkan pedangku di bahuku." Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Atau sesuatu yang lebih baik — dengar, taat, dan bersabarlah."

534.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked the Prophet دلوالله about fasting. He said: "An obligatory act that suffices." He asked: "What about charity?" He said: "Multiplied manifold — and with Allah there is more." He asked: "Which is better?" He said: "The effort of one with little means, or a secret gift to a poor person." He asked: "Which of what Allah revealed to you is greatest?" He said: "Ayat al-Kursi."
534.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Nabi دلوالله tentang puasa. Beliau bersabda: "Kewajiban yang mencukupi." Ia bertanya: "Bagaimana dengan sedekah?" Beliau bersabda: "Berlipat ganda — dan di sisi Allah ada lebih banyak." Ia bertanya: "Mana yang lebih baik?" Beliau bersabda: "Usaha orang yang serba kekurangan, atau pemberian diam-diam kepada orang miskin." Ia bertanya: "Apa yang Allah turunkan kepadamu yang paling agung?" Beliau bersabda: "Ayat al-Kursi."

535.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "When any of you stands for prayer, mercy faces him — so do not move the pebbles."
535.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Ketika salah seorang dari kalian berdiri untuk shalat, rahmat menghadapnya — maka janganlah menggerakkan kerikil."

536.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله supervised a stoning, after which he departed sorrowful and grieving. Then he rested and said to Abu Dharr: "O Abu Dharr, did you know..."
536.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله mengawasi pelaksanaan rajam, setelah itu beliau pergi dalam keadaan sedih dan berduka. Kemudian beliau beristirahat dan berkata kepada Abu Dharr: "Wahai Abu Dharr, tahukah kamu..."

537.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was asked which part of the night is most virtuous for prayer. He said: "I asked the Messenger of Allah دلوالله just as you asked me, and he said: 'The deep middle of the night — and few do it.'"
537.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia ditanya bagian malam manakah yang paling utama untuk shalat. Ia berkata: "Aku bertanya kepada Rasulullah دلوالله sebagaimana kamu bertanya kepadaku, dan beliau bersabda: 'Pertengahan malam yang paling dalam — dan sedikit yang melakukannya.'"

538.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله shook a tree and its leaves began falling. He said: "O Abu Dharr." He said: "Here I am, O Messenger of Allah." He said: "When a Muslim servant prays, seeking Allah's face, his sins fall away just as these leaves fall from this tree."
538.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله mengguncang sebuah pohon dan daun-daunnya mulai berjatuhan. Beliau bersabda: "Wahai Abu Dharr." Ia berkata: "Aku di sini, wahai Rasulullah." Beliau bersabda: "Ketika seorang hamba Muslim shalat, mengharap wajah Allah, dosa-dosanya berjatuhan sebagaimana daun-daun ini berjatuhan dari pohon ini."

539.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "On camels there is zakat, on sheep there is zakat, on cattle there is zakat, and on wheat there is zakat."
539.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Pada unta ada zakat, pada kambing ada zakat, pada sapi ada zakat, dan pada gandum ada zakat."

540.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله asked him: "How will you be when rulers come after me who take this revenue for themselves?" He said: "By the One Who sent you with the truth, I will put my sword on my shoulder and fight until I meet you." He said: "Shall I not show you something better? Be patient until you meet me."
540.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bertanya kepadanya: "Bagaimana keadaanmu ketika para penguasa datang setelahku yang mengambil pendapatan ini untuk diri mereka sendiri?" Ia berkata: "Demi Dzat yang mengutusmu dengan kebenaran, aku akan meletakkan pedangku di bahuku dan berperang hingga aku menemui-Mu." Beliau bersabda: "Maukah aku tunjukkan sesuatu yang lebih baik? Bersabarlah hingga kamu menemui-Ku."

541.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said to him: "O Abu Dharr, how will you be when rulers take this revenue exclusively for themselves?" He said: "By the One Who sent you with the truth, I will put my sword on my shoulder until I reach you." He said: "Shall I not guide you to what is better? Be patient until you meet me."
541.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda kepadanya: "Wahai Abu Dharr, bagaimana keadaanmu ketika para penguasa mengambil pendapatan ini secara eksklusif untuk diri mereka sendiri?" Ia berkata: "Demi Dzat yang mengutusmu dengan kebenaran, aku akan meletakkan pedangku di bahuku hingga aku mencapai-Mu." Beliau bersabda: "Maukah aku membimbingmu kepada yang lebih baik? Bersabarlah hingga kamu menemui-Ku."

542.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "Whoever departs from the community even a hand-span has removed the yoke of Islam from his neck."
542.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Barang siapa memisahkan diri dari jemaah meskipun sejengkal telah melepaskan ikatan Islam dari lehernya."

543.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "Whoever departs from the community even a hand-span has removed the yoke of Islam from his neck."
543.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Barang siapa memisahkan diri dari jemaah meskipun sejengkal telah melepaskan ikatan Islam dari lehernya."

544.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "O Abu Dharr, do not take responsibility for the wealth of an orphan, and do not assume authority over two people."
544.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Wahai Abu Dharr, janganlah bertanggung jawab atas harta anak yatim, dan jangan mengambil otoritas atas dua orang."

545.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "I was given the concluding verses of Surah al-Baqarah from a treasure beneath the Throne — no prophet before me was given them."
545.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Aku diberikan ayat-ayat penutup Surah al-Baqarah dari harta karun di bawah Arsy — tidak ada nabi sebelumku yang diberikannya."

546.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "The truthful, the believed one دلوالله conveyed to me, raising it as a hadith: 'A good deed is worth ten or more, and an evil deed is one — or I forgive. And whoever meets Me without associating anything with Me, though his sins fill the earth, I will grant him forgiveness equal to that amount.'"
546.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berkata: "Yang jujur, yang dipercaya دلوالله menyampaikan kepadaku, meriwayatkan hadits: 'Satu kebaikan bernilai sepuluh atau lebih, dan satu keburukan adalah satu — atau Aku ampuni. Dan barang siapa menemui-Ku tanpa menyekutukan sesuatu pun dengan-Ku, meskipun dosanya memenuhi bumi, Aku akan memberikan kepadanya ampunan sebesar itu.'"

547.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that they stood with the Prophet دلوالله in Ramadan until a third of the first night passed. Then he said: "I think what you seek is ahead of you." Then they stood with him on the twenty-fifth until midnight. He said: "I think what you seek is ahead of you." Then they stood with him on the twenty-seventh until dawn, and he was silent.
547.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa mereka berdiri bersama Nabi دلوالله di bulan Ramadan hingga sepertiga malam pertama berlalu. Kemudian beliau bersabda: "Aku pikir apa yang kalian cari ada di depan kalian." Kemudian mereka berdiri bersamanya pada malam kedua puluh lima hingga tengah malam. Beliau bersabda: "Aku pikir apa yang kalian cari ada di depan kalian." Kemudian mereka berdiri bersamanya pada malam kedua puluh tujuh hingga fajar, dan beliau diam.

548.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "The deeds of my nation were presented to me — good and bad. I found among the best of their deeds removing harm from the road. And I found among the worst of their deeds spittle in the mosque that is not buried."
548.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Amal-amal umatku diperlihatkan kepadaku — yang baik dan yang buruk. Aku menemukan di antara amal terbaik mereka menyingkirkan gangguan dari jalan. Dan aku menemukan di antara amal terburuk mereka dahak di masjid yang tidak dikubur."

549.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "Clean earth is a purification for the Muslim even if he does not find water for ten years. When he finds water, he should touch it to his skin — for that is better."
549.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Tanah yang bersih adalah alat bersuci bagi seorang Muslim meskipun ia tidak menemukan air selama sepuluh tahun. Ketika ia menemukan air, hendaklah ia mengusapkannya ke kulitnya — karena itu lebih baik."

550.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "Whoever performs ghusl on Friday and wears the best of his clothes, uses the perfume of his household, then attends Jumu'ah and does not separate two people — Allah will forgive him whatever is between that Friday and the previous Friday."
550.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Barang siapa mandi pada hari Jumat dan memakai pakaian terbaiknya, menggunakan parfum rumah tangganya, kemudian menghadiri shalat Jumat dan tidak memisahkan dua orang — Allah akan mengampuninya atas apa yang ada antara Jumat itu dan Jumat sebelumnya."
